_comment: Gate V2 reference values (ARCHITECTURE §7). Authored and committed by the human maintainer; computed by an independent Python/NumPy+SciPy SIMP implementation (density filter + OC, exact sparse direct solves) using the same locked formulation as ARCHITECTURE §4 and the same Hex8 element as fixtures/fea/hex_stiffness_reference.json. Agents assert against these values; they do not edit this file. Units: E0=1, voxel edge h=1, so compliance is in consistent nondimensional units; compliance scales as 1/E0.

formulation_locked.material_law: E(rho) = clamp(rho, rho_min, 1)^p * E0 (classic 99-line, NOT modified SIMP)
formulation_locked.filter: DENSITY filter: rho_e = sum_j w_ej x_j / sum_j w_ej, weights w_ej = max(0, rmin - dist(centers_e, centers_j)), rmin = 1.5 voxel units. Sensitivities chain through the filter: dc/dx_j = sum_e (w_ej / sum_i w_ei) * dc/drho_e.
formulation_locked.oc_update: x_new = clip(clip(x * (max(0, -dc/(lambda*dv)))^eta, x-move, x+move), rho_min, 1); eta = 0.5, move = 0.2; lambda by bisection on [0, 1e9] until (l2-l1)/(l1+l2) < 1e-3, constraint mean(rho_physical) <= volfrac.
formulation_locked.initial_design: x = volfrac uniformly on every design voxel
formulation_locked.solver_note: Reference used EXACT direct solves each iteration. The C++ CG must use a tight tolerance (<= 1e-8) or the 60-iteration trajectory can drift; the 5% compliance gate absorbs solver-level differences, not loose-tolerance drift.

cantilever_24x8x8.bcs: Clamp ALL 3 DOF components of every node on the x=0 face.
cantilever_24x8x8.loads: Total Fz = -1.0 distributed EQUALLY over all (ny+1)*(nz+1) = 81 nodes of the x = nx face (each node gets -1/81 in z).

reference.component_note: The two 4-voxel islands sit at the loaded tip face's top/bottom corners (i=nx-1, k=0 and k=nz-1) and connect to the 456-voxel main body only through sub-threshold density. This is an inherent 0.5-threshold artifact of the reference solution, not an error. V2 topology comparison should be on the DOMINANT component; single-connected-component enforcement belongs to V3 on the final extracted/cleaned mesh, not to the raw density field.

gates.dominant_component_spans: the dominant thresholded component must touch both the x=0 face and the loaded x=nx face

clamped_beam_48x8x8.bcs: Clamp ALL 3 DOF components of every node on BOTH the x=0 face and the x=nx face.
clamped_beam_48x8x8.loads: Total Fz = -1.0 distributed EQUALLY over the (ny+1) = 9 nodes of the top center line: nodes with i = nx/2 = 24, k = nz, all j (each node gets -1/9 in z).

gates.dominant_component_spans: the thresholded structure must touch the x=0 face, the x=nx face, and the loaded center-top line

sanity_facts_about_the_reference.volume_constraint_active: achieved volume fraction equals the 0.3 target to ~1e-5 in both problems
sanity_facts_about_the_reference.y_symmetry: both problems are symmetric in y; the reference density fields are y-symmetric to ~1e-11, validating the assembly/filter/OC chain end to end
